scenes.name: Hook
scenes.visual: Bold headline with spring-in animation. Dark background, amber text. Subtle particle/glow effect.

scenes.name: Problem
scenes.visual: Pain point text, word-by-word reveal. Icons of scattered notes, browser tabs, chat windows fading in and out.

scenes.name: Solution Reveal
scenes.visual: LLM Wiki logo + tagline spring in. Show the architecture: terminal -> Claude -> Obsidian with connecting lines animating.

scenes.name: Feature 1 — Ingest
scenes.visual: Terminal mockup showing /ingest command with typewriter effect. Then wipe to Obsidian wiki page screenshot with Ken Burns zoom.

scenes.name: Feature 2 — Query
scenes.visual: Terminal showing /query with typewriter. Then cut to answer with cross-references highlighted. Show graph view screenshot.

scenes.name: Feature 3 — Compounding
scenes.visual: Split screen: left shows page count growing (5, 12, 47, 200+), right shows Obsidian graph view expanding with animated nodes.

scenes.name: Tech Stack
scenes.visual: Three icons staggered in: Claude logo + 'Engine', Terminal icon + 'Interface', Obsidian logo + 'Viewer'. Clean, minimal.

scenes.name: CTA
scenes.visual: GitHub URL with spring-in. Subtle amber glow pulse. Clean exit.

scenes.name: Intro
scenes.visual: Title with spring animation. Subtitle fades in after.

scenes.name: Step 1 — Create a Vault
scenes.visual: Terminal typewriter: /vault-create my-research --domain ai. Then show directory tree animating in. Then Obsidian vault screenshot.

scenes.name: Step 2 — Ingest Sources
scenes.visual: Show 3 rapid ingest commands (web, YouTube, PDF). Each followed by the generated wiki page. Staggered source type icons.

scenes.name: Step 3 — Query Your Wiki
scenes.visual: Terminal: /query 'What do we know about X?'. Answer appears with [[wikilinks]] highlighted. Show graph view.

scenes.name: Step 4 — Health Check
scenes.visual: Terminal: /lint. Show checklist items appearing with green checks. Fix count displayed.

scenes.name: Step 5 — Promote Knowledge
scenes.visual: Diagram: research vault -> meta vault with arrow animation. Pages flying between vaults.

scenes.name: The Compound Effect
scenes.visual: Animated graph growing from 1 node to hundreds. Connections forming. Counter showing pages, cross-references, sources.

scenes.name: Outro
scenes.visual: Start building. GitHub URL. Tech stack icons.
